name: sync registries: /compliance-remove archives the COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml-mapped folder file to _archived/
command:
mkdir -p tree/us-government && printf "source:
  id: nist-x
  authoritative_publisher: NIST
  authoritative_url: https://nist.gov
  registry_link: COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
  fetch_frequency: daily
  fragility_tier: low
  license_note: Public Domain
rules: []
recommended_set: []
all_set: []
" > tree/us-government/nist-x.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/compliance-remove.sh" --id nist-x --tree "$PWD/tree" && [ -f tree/us-government/_archived/nist-x.yaml ] && echo ok 1>&2
